description: LENGTH returns i32 and TRIM returns String, both non-nullable on NOT NULL input
name: string_length_trim
query_sql:
-- @name LengthTrimNames
-- @returns :many
SELECT id, LENGTH(name) AS name_len, TRIM(name) AS trimmed FROM users
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, bio TEXT);
